sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38653" key="e)penneakaide/katos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπεννεᾰκαιδέκᾰτος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[λόγος]</foreign> ratio <sense id="n38653.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2023.tlg004:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope> </bibl>:<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2023.tlg004:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
